default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Adventures Group and GrowthX to discuss SEO performance, content strategy, and upcoming initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/rxzXi-HsMjLyayoXNjcsUxh9Y8D_evzQ?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [SEO performance shows mixed results: some keywords dropping in avg. position, but important terms (e.g., "Las Marietas") gaining traction](https://fathom.video/share/rxzXi-HsMjLyayoXNjcsUxh9Y8D_evzQ?tab=summary&timestamp=34.0)
  - [Content publishing priorities: "What to do in April" articles need immediate publication; May content in progress](https://fathom.video/share/rxzXi-HsMjLyayoXNjcsUxh9Y8D_evzQ?tab=summary&timestamp=576.0)
  - [New tour changes: "Traveler Stable" rebranded to "Taste of Travel"; Isla Mujeres experience split into separate tour page](https://fathom.video/share/rxzXi-HsMjLyayoXNjcsUxh9Y8D_evzQ?tab=summary&timestamp=845.0)
  - [Potential new content ideas: Spring Break in Mexico article, Sargassum season informational piece](https://fathom.video/share/rxzXi-HsMjLyayoXNjcsUxh9Y8D_evzQ?tab=summary&timestamp=493.0)

## Topics

### SEO Performance Analysis

  - [Drop in average position for some keywords, but important terms like "Las Marietas" gaining traction](https://fathom.video/share/rxzXi-HsMjLyayoXNjcsUxh9Y8D_evzQ?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [Potential cannibalization issue between tour pages and articles for key destinations](https://fathom.video/share/rxzXi-HsMjLyayoXNjcsUxh9Y8D_evzQ?tab=summary&timestamp=197.0)
  - [Strategy: Focus on ranking tour pages for main keywords, develop secondary keywords for complementary content](https://fathom.video/share/rxzXi-HsMjLyayoXNjcsUxh9Y8D_evzQ?tab=summary&timestamp=261.0)
  - [Traffic growth observed for "things to do in Puerto Vallarta," "Cabo beaches," and destination safety-related queries](https://fathom.video/share/rxzXi-HsMjLyayoXNjcsUxh9Y8D_evzQ?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)

### Content Publishing Updates

  - [Urgent: "What to do in April" articles need immediate publication to gain traction before month's end](https://fathom.video/share/rxzXi-HsMjLyayoXNjcsUxh9Y8D_evzQ?tab=summary&timestamp=576.0)
  - [Lucero working on April content for all three destinations, aiming to finish this week](https://fathom.video/share/rxzXi-HsMjLyayoXNjcsUxh9Y8D_evzQ?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [May content in progress; Isabel to send articles for review by end of next day](https://fathom.video/share/rxzXi-HsMjLyayoXNjcsUxh9Y8D_evzQ?tab=summary&timestamp=724.0)
  - [Mariana to send content refreshes for approval by week's end](https://fathom.video/share/rxzXi-HsMjLyayoXNjcsUxh9Y8D_evzQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1008.0)

### Tour and Experience Changes

  - ["Traveler Stable" rebranded to "Taste of Travel" due to naming rights issue](https://fathom.video/share/rxzXi-HsMjLyayoXNjcsUxh9Y8D_evzQ?tab=summary&timestamp=878.0)
  - [Isla Mujeres experience split into separate tour page from Rio Secreto offering](https://fathom.video/share/rxzXi-HsMjLyayoXNjcsUxh9Y8D_evzQ?tab=summary&timestamp=937.0)
  - [Opportunity to create new content around Isla Mujeres keywords](https://fathom.video/share/rxzXi-HsMjLyayoXNjcsUxh9Y8D_evzQ?tab=summary&timestamp=996.0)

### New Content Ideas

  - [Proposed: "Spring Break in Mexico" article for Cancun site, targeting Feb 20 - April 1 timeframe](https://fathom.video/share/rxzXi-HsMjLyayoXNjcsUxh9Y8D_evzQ?tab=summary&timestamp=493.0)
  - [Suggested: Sargassum season informational article](https://fathom.video/share/rxzXi-HsMjLyayoXNjcsUxh9Y8D_evzQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1037.0)
      - [Challenge: Balancing accurate information without discouraging travel](https://fathom.video/share/rxzXi-HsMjLyayoXNjcsUxh9Y8D_evzQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1148.0)
      - [Approach: Highlight variability of seaweed presence, alternative activities, and unaffected areas](https://fathom.video/share/rxzXi-HsMjLyayoXNjcsUxh9Y8D_evzQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1212.0)

### Cenote Content Strategy

  - [Plan to create an article about all cenotes featured in tours](https://fathom.video/share/rxzXi-HsMjLyayoXNjcsUxh9Y8D_evzQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1432.0)
  - [Sensitivity around naming specific cenotes to avoid potential business conflicts](https://fathom.video/share/rxzXi-HsMjLyayoXNjcsUxh9Y8D_evzQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)
  - [Angie to provide a limited list of cenote names and recommendations for content approach](https://fathom.video/share/rxzXi-HsMjLyayoXNjcsUxh9Y8D_evzQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1548.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Lucero to complete and publish "What to do in April" articles by end of week](https://fathom.video/share/rxzXi-HsMjLyayoXNjcsUxh9Y8D_evzQ?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Isabel to send May content for review by end of next day](https://fathom.video/share/rxzXi-HsMjLyayoXNjcsUxh9Y8D_evzQ?tab=summary&timestamp=724.0)
  - [Mariana to send content refresh ideas for approval by end of week](https://fathom.video/share/rxzXi-HsMjLyayoXNjcsUxh9Y8D_evzQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1008.0)
  - [Angie to provide list of cenote names and content recommendations](https://fathom.video/share/rxzXi-HsMjLyayoXNjcsUxh9Y8D_evzQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1548.0)
  - [Team to brainstorm angle for Sargassum season article that informs without discouraging travel](https://fathom.video/share/rxzXi-HsMjLyayoXNjcsUxh9Y8D_evzQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1037.0)
  - [Explore creation of "Spring Break in Mexico" article for next year's season](https://fathom.video/share/rxzXi-HsMjLyayoXNjcsUxh9Y8D_evzQ?tab=summary&timestamp=493.0)

action_items.description: Analyze keyword ranking report for declining keywords (esp. Isla Marietas, Las Caletas). Identify affected pages (tour vs article). Prepare recommendations for next meeting.
Send keyword ranking report to Mariana Montezzana for analysis.
Send May articles for review by EOD tomorrow.
Check records on Sargassum season patterns. Compile info on timing, intensity, affected areas for potential article.
Send list of cenotes visited on tours to Mariana. Include names, recommendations for article content without revealing sensitive location info.
